urdu transliteration text: Qayamat Ban Kay Din Ashoor Ka Zainab Pay Aaya Hai
english translation text: The day of Ashura became the day of Qiyamat, and befell Zainab

urdu transliteration text: Hazaron Qatilon Kay Darmeyan Zehra Ka Jaaya Hai
english translation text: The beloved son of Zahra is surrounded by thousands of murderers

urdu transliteration text: Kiya Veeran Ik Jhoola Ujara Aik Madar Ko
english translation text: By destroying the cradle, you took away a mother’s hope

urdu transliteration text: Bata Aey Qatil-e-Asghar Tere Kya Haath Aaya Hai
english translation text: Tell me oh murderer of Asghar, what did you achieve?

urdu transliteration text: Kahan Dhoonday Ali Asghar Ko Mader Kis Taraf Jaaey
english translation text: Where will Ali Asghars mother find him, which way should she go?

urdu transliteration text: Andheri Raat Hai Baysheer Nay Jungle Basaya Hai
english translation text: It's a dark night, Baysheer has settled in the outdoors.

urdu transliteration text: Sada Zehra Ki Aati Thi Utho Ghazi Sahara Do
english translation text: The call of Zahra echoes, 'Stand up Abbas, and give support'.

urdu transliteration text:
Mere Bete Nay Tanha Laasha-e-Akbar Uthaya Hai
My son single-handedly lifted the corpse of Akbar

Sakina Roee Hai Shayad Tamachay Shimr Nay Maaray
Sakina is crying,
maybe Shimr (LA) has struck her
Badal Ker Kervateyn Ghazi Ka Laasha Thar Tharaya Hai
english translation text: Turning left and right restlessly, the flagbearer is suffering in his grave
